title: Eleogiton planifolia
taxonomy: Eleogiton planifolia is classified within the family Alismataceae. This plant is native to tropical regions and belongs to the genus Eleogiton. The Alismataceae family consists of aquatic and semi-aquatic plants, which often thrive in freshwater environments. The classification of Eleogiton planifolia provides insight into its evolutionary history and relationships with other plant species. By examining its classification, researchers can better understand the plant's characteristics and adaptability to different ecosystems.
